meaning: adj.商议定的,协定的,[乐]协调的
examples: We need to make a concerted effort to finish on time.
She has begun to make a concerted effort to find a job.
Their noise modulated to a concerted menacing growl punctuated by sharp yaps.
He sees the government making a concerted effort to emphasize art in public spaces.
He said the prison had "serious operational deficiencies that will require a concerted effort to change".
